title: Himani Chamunda
tagline: Himani Chamunda — spiritual town of Himachal Pradesh

overview.short: Aadi Himani Chamunda is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shri Chamunda Devi, situated in Chandar Bhan, Jia in Kangra Valley, Himachal Pradesh, India, in the Himalayas.
overview.description: Aadi Himani Chamunda is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shri Chamunda Devi, situated in Chandar Bhan, Jia in Kangra Valley, Himachal Pradesh, India, in the Himalayas.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer
Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Shri Chamunda Devi Mandir
topPlaces.description: Shri Chamunda Devi Temple also known as Chamunda Nandikeshwar Dham is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shri Chamunda Devi, a form of Goddess Durga, located at 19 km away from Palampur town in Dharamshala Tehsil of Kangra district of the Northern Indian state of Himachal Pradesh. This is one of the most prominent temples in Himachal Pradesh and one of the most popular all over India.

topPlaces.name: Chamba, Himachal Pradesh
topPlaces.description: Chamba is a town in the Chamba district in the Indian state of Himachal Pradesh. According to the 2001 Indian census, Chamba has a population of 20,312.

topPlaces.name: Gopalpur Zoo
topPlaces.description: Gopalpur Zoo is situated in Gopalpur village, Kangra district, Himachal Pradesh in India, en route the Dharmshala – Palampur road. It is surrounded by Dhauladhar Range of the Himalayas.

topPlaces.name: Gopalpur, Himachal Pradesh
topPlaces.description: Gopalpur is a village in Kangra district of Himachal Pradesh, India located near Palampur. There is also one branch school of the Tibetan Children's Village.

topPlaces.name: Sidhbari
topPlaces.description: Sidhbari is a suburb of Dharamshala town, situated in the foothills of Dhauladhar mountains, in Kangra district of the state of Himachal Pradesh, India. The Samadhi (final resting place) of Sri Chinmayananda is located here.

itinerary.title: Day 1 — Shri Chamunda Devi Mandir & around

items.note: Shri Chamunda Devi Temple also known as Chamunda Nandikeshwar Dham is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shri Chamunda Devi, a form of Goddess Durga, located at 19 km away from Palampur town in Dharamshala Tehsil of Kangra district of the Northern Indian state of Himachal Pradesh. This is one of the most prominent temples in Himachal Pradesh and one of the most popular all over India.
Chamba is a town in the Chamba district in the Indian state of Himachal Pradesh. According to the 2001 Indian census, Chamba has a population of 20,312.
Gopalpur Zoo is situated in Gopalpur village, Kangra district, Himachal Pradesh in India, en route the Dharmshala – Palampur road. It is surrounded by Dhauladhar Range of the Himalayas.
Gopalpur is a village in Kangra district of Himachal Pradesh, India located near Palampur. There is also one branch school of the Tibetan Children's Village.

Sidhbari is a suburb of Dharamshala town, situated in the foothills of Dhauladhar mountains, in Kangra district of the state of Himachal Pradesh, India. The Samadhi (final resting place) of Sri Chinmayananda is located here.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Himani Chamunda?
faq.a: The best time to visit Himani Chamunda is Mar – Jun, Sep – Nov. Summers are 15–28°C and winters are 2–16°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Himani Chamunda?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Kangra Airport (Gaggal), Dharamshala (18 km) and the nearest railway station is Ludhiana Junction (153 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Himani Chamunda?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Himani Chamunda at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Himani Chamunda?
faq.a: Stays in Himani Chamunda start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Himani Chamunda?
faq.a: The top attractions are Shri Chamunda Devi Mandir, Chamba, Himachal Pradesh, Gopalpur Zoo, Gopalpur, Himachal Pradesh, Sidhbari.
